# Twent Documentation

> Complete reference guide for Twent, the AI agent for Android. Covers installation, configuration, tools, automation, and advanced features.

## What We Do Not Do

- **Twent documentation is not a chatbot guide.** Twent is an agentic AI that acts on your device — not a chatbot you query. The docs cover real capabilities: terminal commands, UI automation, MCP setup, local models.
- **Twent documentation is not a web app guide.** Twent is a native Android APK. It runs on your device, not in a browser.
- **Twent documentation is not just about chat.** The chat interface is one feature. The docs cover 50+ tools, Ubuntu terminal, automation workflows, skills system, MCP servers, and local AI model support.

## Documentation Structure

### Getting Started
- [Installation](https://twent.xyz/docs#installation) — APK download, Android 8.0+ requirement, ~80MB
- [First Setup](https://twent.xyz/docs#first-setup) — Configure AI model (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Deepseek, OpenRouter, LM Studio, local GGUF)
- [Your First Chat](https://twent.xyz/docs#first-chat) — Chat with the AI, tool transparency, streaming responses
- [Permissions](https://twent.xyz/docs#permissions) — Storage, Network, Accessibility (UI automation), Display Over Apps (floating chat)

### Chat Features
- [Chat Overview](https://twent.xyz/docs#chat-overview) — Streaming, tool transparency, conversation management, markdown rendering
- [Chat Styles](https://twent.xyz/docs#chat-styles) — Cursor (streaming) and Bubble modes
- [Floating Chat](https://twent.xyz/docs#floating-chat) — Bubble, Window, Fullscreen overlay modes

### Tools (50+ Built-in Tools)
- [Tools Overview](https://twent.xyz/docs#tools-overview) — Tool categories, parallel execution, transparency
- [File System](https://twent.xyz/docs#file-system) — read_file, write_file, patch, search_files, compress/decompress
- [Shell & Terminal](https://twent.xyz/docs#shell) — Ubuntu 24.04, apt, npm, pip, git, ssh, bash/zsh/fish
- [Web](https://twent.xyz/docs#web) — fetch_url, search (DuckDuckGo, Tavily, Bing), download_file, web_visit
- [Media](https://twent.xyz/docs#media) — FFmpeg, camera, OCR, TTS/STT (Sherpa-NCNN, OpenAI TTS, SiliconFlow)
- [UI Automation](https://twent.xyz/docs#ui-automation) — tap, swipe, scroll, type, screenshot, get_ui_tree, press_key, open_app
- [JavaScript](https://twent.xyz/docs#javascript) — execute_code with Node.js, npm packages
- [MCP](https://twent.xyz/docs#mcp) — Model Context Protocol servers, tool injection

### Automation
- [Automation Overview](https://twent.xyz/docs#automation-overview) — UI automation, shell, intents, workflows
- [Tasker Integration](https://twent.xyz/docs#tasker) — Trigger Twent from Tasker and vice versa

### Packages & Marketplace
- [Packages Overview](https://twent.xyz/docs#packages-overview) — JS/TS tool bundles, ZIP import
- [Skills](https://twent.xyz/docs#skills) — AI behavior bundles (Code Review, Data Analysis, Writing, Research)
- [Marketplace](https://twent.xyz/docs#marketplace) — Browse/install community packages, skills, MCP servers

### Workflows
- [Workflows Overview](https://twent.xyz/docs#workflows-overview) — Simple, chained, conditional, scheduled
- [Workflow Examples](https://twent.xyz/docs#workflow-examples) — Morning briefing, file backup, low battery alert

### Advanced Features
- [Memory](https://twent.xyz/docs#memory) — Persistent knowledge storage, memory_search/save/update/link
- [Voice](https://twent.xyz/docs#voice) — TTS (system, OpenAI, SiliconFlow), STT (Sherpa-NCNN offline), wake word
- [Settings](https://twent.xyz/docs#settings) — Model config, themes, context, summarization
- [Toolbox](https://twent.xyz/docs#toolbox) — Shell executor, terminal, file manager, SQL viewer, logcat, UI debugger

### Tool Reference
- [Tool Reference](https://twent.xyz/docs#tool-reference) — Complete parameter reference for all tools

## Technical Specifications
- Android 8.0+ (API 26), arm64-v8a, 3GB+ RAM, 500MB+ storage
- Ubuntu 24.04 LTS (chroot container)
- Package managers: apt, pip, npm, cargo, gem
- Languages: Python 3, Node.js, Go, Rust, C/C++
- Editors: vim, nano
- Version control: git, gh CLI
- AI models: OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Deepseek, OpenRouter, Kilo Gateway, NVIDIA NIMS, LM Studio, local GGUF/MNN

## Privacy & Security
- All data stored locally on device
- API keys encrypted with Android KeyStore (BYOK)
- Zero telemetry, zero analytics, no data collection
- Open source and auditable
- Local AI models (MNN/llama.cpp) for offline inference

## Quick Reference
- Download: https://twent.xyz (direct APK, no Play Store)
- Support: support@twent.xyz
- GitHub: https://github.com/twent
- Changelog: https://twent.xyz/changelog
